title: Thicc Swords Mod
description: Adds thicc variants of 2 swords (for now) with 3D models
body:
This mod currently adds 2 new swords!
- Thicc Diamond Sword
- Thicc Iron Sword

These function just about the same as their normal variants, except stronger

The Thicc Iron Sword features:
- 8 Damage
- 2,000 Durability 
  
And it's crafted like this:
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5bc825addc81130e9edef30e9499a84b8a6cc54.png)

The Thicc Diamond Sword features:
- 9 Damage
- 10,000 Durablility
  
And it's crafted like this:
![craft 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7382cd571b40cb0f9611444d5fce775601ec0f29.png)

Yes, the icons are kinda broken, but at least they look cool when you hold them, riiiiiiiiiiiiiiiight?

Made by mautip for [Creamers Inc.](https://modrinth.com/organization/creamers-inc) <3
